title: Build Amar Ghumontovilla literary portal with sections, comments, contact form, SEO, and floral theme

requirements.text: Create a single-page literary portal named “Amar Ghumontovilla” with top navigation and five sections: Home, Poems, Stories, Essays, and Contact. Navigation must switch the visible section without a full page reload and must visually indicate the active section.

quotes:
• Home
  • আমার কবিতা
  • গল্প
  • প্রবন্ধ
  • Contact

acceptanceCriteria: A header nav is present on all views with links for Home/Poems/Stories/Essays/Contact.
Clicking a nav item shows the corresponding section content and hides the others without refreshing the page.
The currently selected section is clearly highlighted.

requirements.text: Implement a consistent “hero” banner at the top of each section containing a floral image and a section title, matching the structure in the provided HTML (hero image + heading).

quotes:
Welcome to Amar Ghumontovilla

A serene space for literary exploration amidst nature's beauty.

acceptanceCriteria: Each section starts with a hero area that includes a static floral image and a title.
The hero layout is consistent across sections and responsive on mobile and desktop.

requirements.text: Add per-section comments for Home, Poems, Stories, and Essays: each section must display a comment form (textarea + submit) and a list of submitted comments for that section. Comments must be persisted on the backend and loaded on page visit/refresh.

quotes: Comments

acceptanceCriteria: Each of the four sections (Home/Poems/Stories/Essays) shows a comments area with a form and a list.
Submitting a comment adds it to the correct section list immediately and persists it in the canister.
Reloading the app shows previously submitted comments in the correct section.
Basic validation prevents submitting empty comments.

requirements.text: Implement the Contact section to display the email address “contact@amarghumontovilla.in” and provide a contact form with Name, Email, and Message fields plus a Send button. Submissions must be persisted on the backend (store messages) and the UI must show a clear success state after submit.

quotes: Email: contact@amarghumontovilla.in

acceptanceCriteria: The Contact section displays the email address exactly as provided.
The contact form validates required fields and basic email format.
Submitting the form stores the message in the backend and shows a success confirmation in the UI.
The form is cleared (or disabled) after a successful send to prevent duplicate submissions by mistake.

requirements.text: Add an on-page translation widget placeholder container with id "google_translate_element" and integrate Google Translate element loading on the frontend so the widget renders in the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: A "google_translate_element" container exists in the rendered app.
The Google Translate script is loaded on the client and the widget renders (when accessible) without breaking the app if it fails to load.

requirements.text: Configure SEO and social metadata for the app equivalent to the provided HTML: title, meta description, keywords, author, Open Graph (title/description/image/url), and canonical URL for https://www.amarghumontovilla.in.

quotes:
<meta name="description" content="আমার ঘুমন্ত ভিলা: A personal blog for literary works including poems, stories, and essays in Bengali, with a nature-inspired floral aesthetic.">
    <meta name="keywords" content="Bengali literature, poems, stories, essays, floral blog, Amar Ghumontovilla">
    <meta name="author" content="Amar Ghumontovilla">
    <meta property="og:title" content="আমার ঘুমন্ত ভিলা">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Explore literary works in a secure, nature-inspired portal.">
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://www.amarghumontovilla.in/images/flower-bouquet.jpg">
    <meta property="og:url" content="https://www.amarghumontovilla.in">
    <link rel="canonical" href="https://www.amarghumontovilla.in">

acceptanceCriteria: The built app sets the document title and includes meta tags for description/keywords/author.
Open Graph tags for title/description/image/url are present.
A canonical link tag exists for https://www.amarghumontovilla.in.

requirements.text: Apply a coherent, nature-inspired floral visual theme across the app (color palette, typography, spacing, buttons, form styling) with a calm editorial feel suitable for reading long-form text; ensure it is consistently applied to navigation, hero, content, and forms.

quotes: meta name="description" content="... with a nature-inspired floral aesthetic."

acceptanceCriteria: The UI has a consistent floral/nature-inspired theme and readable typography for long text.
Forms, buttons, navigation, and section layouts share consistent styling.
The theme works well on mobile and desktop and maintains good text contrast.

requirements.text: Generate and include required static images in the app under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the UI (hero image and optional background pattern) instead of hotlinking external images.
acceptanceCriteria: Newly generated image assets exist under frontend/public/assets/generated.
The hero banner uses the generated floral image from local static assets.
OG image metadata points to the correct deployed static image path (not a placeholder).

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor (no additional backend services).
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or other immutable paths listed by the platform; compose them instead.
Do not add third-party authentication providers; only Internet Identity is allowed if authentication is later needed.
Do not rely on external databases or non-IC hosting services for persistence.
nonGoals: Implementing an admin dashboard or authoring workflow for adding/editing poems, stories, or essays.
User accounts, moderation tools, spam prevention, or CAPTCHA for comments/contact forms.
Real-time updates (WebSockets) for comments or contact messages.

required: Floral bouquet hero photograph/illustration with soft natural lighting (flower-bouquet-hero.dim_1920x800.png)
Seamless subtle floral pattern background texture, low contrast (floral-pattern-bg.dim_1024x1024.png)
